summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for Swiss Telecom Quality Audit application. Backend APIs and frontend functionality tested successfully with full AI integration working.

design_issues.issue:
HTML validation warnings about nested
in

elements

passed_tests: Backend root endpoint (GET /api/) - Returns correct message
Templates CRUD operations - All 5 default templates load, update and reset work
AI ticket analysis (POST /api/tickets/analyze) - Completes in 8.6s with proper scoring
Ticket CRUD operations - List, detail, delete all functional
Dashboard KPIs endpoint - Returns proper statistics
Frontend page navigation - All 5 pages accessible via sidebar
Analyse Ticket form - Input fields, dropdowns, textarea all functional
AI analysis integration - Sheet overlay opens with results, tab navigation works
Backend-Frontend integration - Seamless data flow between APIs and UI
Charts and data visualization - Radar charts, pie charts, KPI cards render correctly
Templates editing functionality - Edit/save/cancel operations work properly

success_percentage.integration: 100% (AI analysis and data flow working perfectly)
